timeline.sectionDesc2months: Plenty of time. Start with comparing movers and decluttering to make later stages easier.
timeline.sectionDesc1month: Handle utility transfers and address changes across your accounts.
timeline.sectionDesc2weeks: Time to start packing! Begin with items you won't need until after the move.
timeline.sectionDesc1week: Empty the fridge, gather valuables, and prepare your moving day essentials.
timeline.sectionDescDay: Moving day! Do your final walkthrough and make sure nothing gets left behind.
timeline.sectionDescAfter: Update your license, voter registration, and settle into your new home.
timeline.memoPlaceholder: Notes (mover's phone, key pickup location, etc.)

task.notePlaceholder: Phone numbers, booking refs, URLs — anything you need to remember

settings.title: Settings
settings.moveDateDesc: Update if your plans change. Task timelines will adjust automatically.
settings.notificationsDesc: Get reminded when task deadlines are approaching.
settings.proDescription: Custom tasks, reminder notifications, multi-move management, PDF export
settings.aboutDesc: Set your moving date and get an auto-generated checklist covering everything from utilities to paperwork — for both domestic and international moves.

onboarding.title: Set Your Moving Date
onboarding.subtitle: Just pick a date and we'll build a personalized checklist around it. You can always change it later.
